lines.text: Ninety percent of traders blow their accounts. It is not the strategy. It is these three things.
Reason one. No journal. You do not know what is working.
Reason two. No risk firewall. One revenge trade nukes a week.
Reason three. No system check. You trade through bad regimes.
AlgoSphere is built around exactly these three. Auto journal. Fifteen gate risk engine. Market regime detection.
Built for what kills traders. Free trial. Link in bio.
